doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contradicts established EDPB/CJEU doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and its cited references and numbering do not correspond to any real EDPB instrument.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document contradicts settled EDPB/CJEU positions (pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR per Breyer/IAB Europe) and the cited references (e.g., "EDPB Guidance 05/2014") and reference number do not match any real EDPB instrument.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contradicts established EDPB/CJEU doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and its cited references and numbering do not correspond to any real EDPB instrument.
